basic_details.job_title: DCPU Madhubani Assistant Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Madhubani (DCPU Madhubani)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Madhubani (DCPU Madhubani) Assistant Person Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Madhubani district administration. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Madhubani Assistant Person Recruitment 2026 on a contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with Graduate degree in any discipline and three years experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling along with Graduate degree in any discipline and three years experience.

selection_process: Interview Merit List based on educational qualification and interview marks
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Madhubani Assistant Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://madhubani.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Madhubani Assistant Person Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Madhubani Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Madhubani Assistant Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Madhubani Assistant Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://madhubani.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Madhubani Assistant Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Assistant Person posts is 09-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 35 vacancies for the Assistant Person post at the District Child Protection Unit Madhubani.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduate degree in Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law, or a Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with a Graduate degree and three years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Person position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 9000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Person role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview and a merit list based on educational qualifications and interview marks.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCPU Madhubani, which is https://madhubani.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant Person post is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The specific age limit details are not provided in the summary, and candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for this information.
